since_last: 58% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.27%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.06% · BTC +0.49% · Gold +1.12% · Nasdaq100 +0.41%. 58% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.27%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.27%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.57%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +7.64%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +7.64%, VRT +7.63%, AMAT +7.38%, SMR +6.52%, MRVL +6.43%. Laggards: APP -4.21%, AI -3.82%, SNAP -3.59%, META -3.51%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.69% at $198.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
